overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person walk through a rain-soaked, neon-lit urban plaza at night. The player approaches an outdoor seating area with NPCs, then continues through the plaza past illuminated planters and digital billboards, eventually reaching a covered parking area with a futuristic sports car.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale outdoor dining plaza with wet reflective pavement

events.description: begins walking forward through the plaza toward the outdoor seating area
approaches the illuminated patio area with warmer artificial lighting mixing with neon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rain-soaked plaza toward a seated NPC at an outdoor table

notable_agents.action: man in white textured suit and fedora sitting at table, looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: Futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents towering above the plaza
Large digital screen on building facade displaying a portrait advertisement
Round high-top table with stools on the wet pavement
Building wall with bright red neon signage and lighting
Large white umbrella providing shelter over outdoor seating

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city plaza at night, with towering glass skyscrapers and neon lights reflecting off the wet pavement. The camera walks forward toward an outdoor seating area where a man in a white suit sits at a table, passing a red structural pillar and white canopy umbrella along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate covered patio seating adjacent to a neon-lit bar

events.description: moves from open plaza into the covered patio area under the building overhang
camera circles around the table, shifting perspective from behind to beside the seated couple

agents.ego_description: circling around the table to observe the seated couple engaged in conversation and drinks

notable_agents.action: man in white suit holding a drink and phone, looking up toward the camera
woman with golden cybernetic arms and blonde hair, holding a wine glass and conversing

entered.detail: Round table with distinctive black and white checkered pattern
Lit candle in decorative holder providing warm ambient light on the table
Bar area visible through glass with vibrant purple neon lighting and bottles

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered patio area and circles around a checkered table where a man in a white suit and a woman with golden cybernetic arms are seated. Warm candlelight mixes with purple neon from the adjacent bar interior as the camera observes their interaction from multiple angles.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian promenade with illuminated planters and digital advertising displays

events.description: exits the covered patio back into the open plaza walkway
passes through varying neon light zones, transitioning from purple to teal illumination

agents.ego_description: walking away from the seating area through the expansive plaza, exploring the neon-lit environment

entered.detail: Rectangular planters with green shrubs featuring integrated ground-level lighting
Large digital advertisement displaying 'JINGUJI' with a reclining figure
Modern dark benches lined along the walkway
Contemporary shop front with large glass windows and interior lighting

segments.scene_description: Leaving the patio, the camera walks through a long, empty plaza promenade lined with illuminated planters and benches. The wet pavement reflects the teal and red neon lights from surrounding skyscrapers as the camera approaches a large JINGUJI digital billboard at the far end of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking area with concrete stairs and vehicle access

events.description: enters covered parking structure from the open plaza, lighting becomes harsher and more artificial
approaches parked futuristic vehicle as a pedestrian with umbrella passes by
vehicle headlights turn on, illuminating the parking area with bright beams

agents.ego_description: approaching the parked sports car in the covered parking area, preparing for vehicle entry

notable_agents.action: person holding an umbrella walking past the parked car toward the stairs
futuristic black sports car with distinctive red taillights, headlights activate as camera approaches

entered.detail: Sleek angular black vehicle with prominent red light strip and glowing headlights
Wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward
Large wall-mounted illuminated sign for JINGUJI brand
Yellow and black taxi cab parked in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered parking area with harsh overhead lighting, approaching a sleek black futuristic sports car. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks past as the camera circles the vehicle, which then activates its headlights, bathing the wet asphalt in bright light before the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk plaza that transitions from a neon-lit social hub to a stark, industrial parking area. It begins by moving across wet pavement reflecting towering skyscrapers, passing a red structural pillar and white umbrellas toward an outdoor seating area. As the camera enters a covered patio, the atmosphere shifts to a more intimate setting where warm candlelight blends with purple neon while circling a man in a white suit and a woman with golden cybernetic arms. The scene then opens back into a long, empty promenade lined with illuminated planters, gliding through teal and red reflections toward a massive JINGUJI digital billboard. Finally, the camera moves into a covered parking zone under harsh overhead lighting, circling a sleek black sports car that activates its headlights to bathe the asphalt in bright light.
